workLog.action: Selected issue #1799 (P2 enhancement, ClawSweeper triage pipeline) from candidates JSON. Branch feat/1799-autonomous already created at 550634c0.
Inspected scripts/audit_orphaned_branches.py and scripts/invoke_pr_maintenance.py to align dataclass + argparse + exit-code conventions with the rest of the repo per ADR-035 and ADR-042.

Wrote scripts/issue_triage.py implementing Phase 1 mechanical triage rules (stale, missing priority label, missing area label) with read-only design, JSON or human output, optional --input file for offline runs, and gh CLI integration.

Wrote tests/test_issue_triage.py covering 44 cases across timestamp parsing, record parsing, label predicates, classify, build_report, format_human, fetch_open_issues with mocked subprocess, load_issues_from_input, and main exit codes (0, 2, 3). All 44 pass; 104 related pytests pass.
Smoke-tested against rjmurillo/ai-agents live: 30 open issues scanned, 1 missing area-* label finding (#1622). Read-only: no API mutations.

nextSteps: Phase 2 (LLM triage) and Phase 3 (recommendation execution) tracked under follow-up issues
Consider scheduling via cron workflow once Phase 1 is validated in CI
Add linked-PR-status rule when needed (requires gh issue view per issue, costs API budget)
